why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:bundle_delimiter must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and empty body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet-support evidence only, not bundle grouping behavior, Play state transition handling, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test cannot compile because Packet::BundleDelimiterClientbound does not exist, and the current Protocol 775 mapping has no Play clientbound table for official packet id 0x00.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
